name: Tyco International Ltd.
description: Tyco International plc was a global provider of security, fire detection, and life safety products and services. The company operated through various segments, offering integrated security solutions, fire suppression systems, and industrial valves and controls to commercial, industrial, and governmental customers worldwide. Following a series of corporate restructurings and spin-offs, Tyco International merged with Johnson Controls in 2016 to form Johnson Controls International plc. At the time of its final independent operation, the company was domiciled in Ireland, having previously moved its legal headquarters there for strategic and tax purposes.
